purpose: Follow-up direct-stage hardware probes after tnd58 showed Party/City/The End black-screen and Hotel/Volcano prism corruption.

method.contact_sheet_rule: Use *_postcycle contact sheets; first/pre-cycle tiles can show the previously loaded ROM and must not be used for level identity.

misses.result: Restoring direct table0, global width/height helpers, camera viewport constants, or combinations did not fix Party/City/The End black screens or Hotel/Volcano prism corruption.
Party and The End remained black. Stock z-buffer footprint remains useful evidence because it changed City into visible rendering, but it is not a standalone fix.

key_results.result: City reaches the Saigon Streets render instead of black when the whole gameplay viewport/helper family is stock.
City also reaches gameplay when only normal non-camera viewport dimensions are restored.
Party and The End still black-screen, proving their failure is not the same viewport-helper issue as City.

promoted_candidate.name: tnd8040
promoted_candidate.change: Move only the low framebuffer base/clear from 0x80300000 to 0x80400000 on top of the tnd58/tlbpages58 007-label branch.

hardware_results.result: Boots through title/intro into rendered Party scenes instead of black/hard-lock.
Boots into City of Hamburg/End Credits scene instead of black.
Boots through Saigon Streets into live rendering.
Boots into stable-looking Hotel rendering; sampled prism/blown-out corruption is gone.
Boots through Volcano intro into live rendering; one early static/noise frame remains in the sheet, but the prior persistent prism class is not present in sampled live frames.
Boots into live Labs rendering. Encoder pickup still requires manual gameplay testing.
Boots through Tower intro into rendered scenes.
Boots through Boat intro into very dark live rendering.

uploaded_full_rom.result: SC64 accepted tnd8040.z64/tnd8040.sav in direct ROM mode and startup reaches CMK/logos/gunbarrel/title.

next_manual_test: Use the already-loaded tnd8040 full ROM and the all-missions save.
Verify normal save-file flow and mission select still work.
Manually test Party, City, The End, Hotel, Volcano, Tower, Boat, Labs encoder pickup/door, and the previously good controls.
Expect front/gunbarrel/menu polish issues to remain; this candidate was promoted for playability/stage rendering.
